CustomField.description: Checked if there is an LLP Template link
CustomField.formula: if(AND( leaseworks__IIN__c = leaseworks__LLP_DB_LLP__r.leaseworks__IIN__c ,leaseworks__IIN__c<>""),true, if(AND( leaseworks__Part_Number__c = leaseworks__LLP_DB_LLP__r.leaseworks__Part_Number__c ,leaseworks__Position_LLP__c =leaseworks__LLP_DB_LLP__r.leaseworks__Position_LLPT__c, leaseworks__LLP_DB_LLP__c<>"" ),true,if(AND( Name = leaseworks__LLP_DB_LLP__r.leaseworks__Part_Name__c ,Name<>""),true,false)))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Checked if there is an LLP Template link
CustomField.label: Template Match?
